grid.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 h-screen overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all duration-200
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-muted text-foreground rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors duration-200

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-border/60 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 p-6
cards.service: group relative overflow-hidden bg-white rounded-3xl border border-border/50 p-8 hover:border-primary/30 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1

inputs.base: flex h-12 w-full rounded-xl border border-input bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary/20 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 transition-all duration-200

chatbot.container: flex flex-col h-full bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-xl border-r border-border/40
chatbot.bubble_bot: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-4 py-3 max-w-[85%] text-sm shadow-sm
chatbot.bubble_user: bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-4 py-3 max-w-[85%] ml-auto text-sm shadow-sm

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text is slate-800 or darker on light backgrounds. Use slate-500 for secondary text.
accessibility.aria_labels: All interactive elements must have aria-label if text is not descriptive.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Outfit' font for all headings to establish a friendly, modern brand.
Use 'DM Sans' for body text to ensure high readability and a human touch.
Implement the Two-Column Dashboard: Left Sidebar (30-35% width) for Chatbot, Right Panel (65-70%) for Booking/Appointments.
The Chatbot should feel like a 'Virtual Concierge' - warm, helpful, not robotic.
Use the 'Soft Teal' (#3A8D91) sparingly for primary actions and accents. Do not overuse it for backgrounds.
Service Selection should use the 'Bento' grid layout with 'Service Cards' that lift slightly on hover.
Ensure the 'Booking Form' is clean and step-based or clear sections to reduce cognitive load.
IMPORTANT: Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards) for testing.
Use Shadcn UI components but override styles to match the 'rounded-xl' and 'soft shadow' aesthetic.
For the Auth Screen, use a split layout: Left side engaging image/branding, Right side clean form.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for overlays.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc.
